title: Tech Talent Staffing India: What Changed After the Layoffs
deck: 5.8 million professionals moved. Most companies still haven't updated how they hire.
key_findings: SMBs now drive 40% of new engineering hiring demand

sections.heading: India does not have a talent shortage
sections.body: It has a distribution problem. Talent concentrated in a few cities and a few company types isn't reaching the companies that need it.

sections.heading: Why SMBs are the next wave
sections.body: Large tech companies over-hired and corrected. SMBs are absorbing that talent but lack the employer brand to find it directly.

pull_quote: The talent didn't disappear. It just stopped applying to job boards.
key_takeaways: Look beyond traditional job boards for senior talent
SMB hiring requires different sourcing than enterprise
Speed matters more than brand recognition right now
author: Kavita Rai
